/****** Object:  Table [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER]    Script Date: 05-10-2023 12:34:29 ******/
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO

SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER]
(
	[CustomerID] [nvarchar](15) NOT NULL,
	[LeadID] [nvarchar](15) NULL,
	[FirstName] [nvarchar](30) NULL,
	[LastName] [nvarchar](30) NULL,
	[Address1] [nvarchar](50) NULL,
	[Address2] [nvarchar](50) NULL,
	[City] [nvarchar](35) NULL,
	[State] [char](2) NULL,
	[Zip] [nvarchar](7) NULL,
	[Zip4] [char](4) NULL,
	[Phone] [nvarchar](25) NULL,
	[Email] [nvarchar](100) NULL,
	[CallMorning] [bit] NULL,
	[CallAfternoon] [bit] NULL,
	[CallEvening] [bit] NULL,
	[CallWeekend] [bit] NULL,
	[CreditRating] [nvarchar](128) NULL,
	[LP_DateAdded] [datetime] NULL,
	[LP_LastChanged] [datetime] NULL,
	[LP_CustomerID] [int] NULL,
	[LP_LeadID] [nvarchar](15) NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](10) NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime] NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
